title: There Was Always Sun Shining Someplace: Life in the Negro Baseball Leagues
original_title: There Was Always Sun Shining Someplace: Life in the Negro Baseball Leagues
overview: Chronicles the history of Negro Leagues baseball by using rare historical footage and interviews with black baseball greats.
